---
title: "🗓️ Lecture 05: Quantitative and qualitative research"
date: "2026-10-19"
author: "Anna-Katharina Kothe"
date-modified: last-modified
---

## 🎯 Content and goals

- You understand how to differentiate and gain an overview over qualitative and quantitative methods.
- You can connect qualitative and quantitative methods to research designs and critically discuss the strengths and weaknesses of using qualitative or quantitative methods.
- You know the concept of (methodological) pluralism.

## 🖥️ Lecture Slides

*The slides for this lecture will be made available here.*

<!-- When a slide PDF is ready, place it in `content/lecture/slides/`
and embed it with the block below (adjust the filename):

```{=html}
<div class="container" style="position: relative;overflow: hidden;width: 100%;padding-top: 56.25%;">
<iframe src="slides/RM26_L05_QuantQual.pdf" style="position: absolute;top: 0;left: 0;bottom: 0;right: 0;width: 100%;height: 100%;" allowfullscreen loading="lazy"></iframe>
</div>
```
-->

## 📚 Mandatory Reading

*To be announced.*

## 🏆 Further Readings

- @mahoney2006twocultures
- @nowell2019rigor

## ✍️ Exercises and coursework

*No coursework for this lecture.*

-------

If you have questions or problems, please post them in the [Moodle](https://elearning.uni-flensburg.de/moodle/course/view.php?id=17920) forum.

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
